news.title: In de fietsenkelder van de Beurs van Berlage zit nu een bar: ‘Dit soort plekken zie je veel in Londen, maar in Amsterdam eigenlijk nergens’ - Het Parool
news.summary:
# Summary

A new bar has opened in the bicycle basement of Amsterdam's Beurs van Berlage building, offering a unique concept rarely seen in Amsterdam but common in London. This underground venue provides visitors with an unusual and atmospheric dining/drinking spot in a historic location. For tourists and locals, it's a distinctive new destination that combines Amsterdam's bike culture with a trendy bar experience in an iconic building.

Visitors to Lisbon looking for authentic Portuguese food without breaking the bank should definitely know about this spot, as €10 daily menus are increasingly rare in the city's modern restaurant scene.
